name: Grapefruit Chiffon Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, sift together flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
2. Make a well in the center. Add oil, egg yolks, grated grapefruit peel, and grapefruit juice. Beat until smooth with an electric mixer.
3. In another bowl, beat egg whites with cream of tartar until stiff peaks form.
4. Gradually fold the flour mixture (it will be stiff) into the egg white mixture in a thin stream, folding gently to combine.
5. Pour batter into an ungreased tube pan and bake for 55 minutes at 350°F, or until a lightly touched finger leaves no indentation and the cake springs back when inverted. Cool completely.
6. Loosen edges and transfer to a cake plate.
-----------------------------------GLAZE-----------------------------------
1. Mix powdered sugar, remaining grated grapefruit peel, vanilla, and enough grapefruit juice in a bowl to make the glaze pourable. Drizzle over the cooled cake.
